Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1 — Purpose: Surface the operations Slack thread on the Helios cold-chain cancellation and DOT failure without relying on a single keyword hit. Tool: conversations_search_messages. Parameters: search_query (e.g. "CryoShip Express" or "Helios Biotech" or "DOT inspection"), filter_in_channel (operations channel id C006), optional filter_date_on or filter_date_after around 2026-04-24. Outcome: Message from Fatimah Al-Rashidi stating CryoShip Express cancelled the booked minus 80 degrees C slot because the only qualified truck failed DOT inspection, pickup target May 1, risk to culture shipment.
OE 2 — Purpose: Pull the full thread so the Greg Pallone / Swift escalation is explicit. Tool: conversations_replies. Parameters: channel_id C006, thread_ts 1777035600.000100. Outcome: Reply from Chloe Vance directing Greg Pallone at Swift Relocations for specialty freight capacity and help drafting client comms once a carrier name exists.
OE 3 — Purpose: Second cross-check Slack path with a different search_query than OE 1 so the prompt’s “more than one search” requirement is clearly satisfied (not redundant with OE 1). Tool: conversations_search_messages. Parameters: search_query (e.g. "Swift Relocations" or "Greg Pallone"), filter_in_channel C006, filter_date_after 2026-04-23. Outcome: Same incident narrative or Chloe’s reply tying Swift and Greg Pallone to the replacement path.
OE 4 — Purpose: Capture the client’s written deadline and May window in email (prompt: threads especially Fatimah with the client). Tool: search_emails. Parameters: query (e.g. "Helios" or "Yara Osman" or "Written confirmation"), folder_name INBOX; optional second search_emails call with query (e.g. "Fatimah Helios" or "CryoShip") to surface coordinator-side mail if present. Outcome: Inbound email email_helios_yara_written_confirm_0424 from yara.osman@heliosbiotech.com to fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com: written confirmation by end of day Thursday April 30 that the replacement plan still meets pickup on May 1 and delivery to our San Diego lab by May 3; if Swift Relocations is the path, name the carrier contact and the committed window so Helios can brief compliance (email wording: so we can brief compliance) (this universe may show no additional Fatimah-sent thread beyond what investigation needs).
OE 5 — Purpose: Read the full QuickBooks estimate line tied to estimate NMX-2026-0501 and the fourteen thousand two hundred dollar booked amount. Tool: quickbooks_read_invoice. Parameters: invoice_id inv_helios_cryo_estimate_2026 (primary path; universe exports this id). Optional fallback only if invoice_id is unknown: quickbooks_search_invoices with criteria object shaped per the live QuickBooks MCP (criteria is object | null in Server_Tools_Details.md; use fields such as DocNumber NMX-2026-0501 or customer Helios Biotech only as supported by the implementation). Outcome: DocNumber NMX-2026-0501, TotalAmt 14200, line describing Dr. Yara Osman, Helios Biotech, Philadelphia to San Diego specialty cold chain, CryoShip Express DOT failure contingency, final invoice may adjust after replacement carrier award.
OE 6 — Purpose: Align CRM deal record to booked value and vendor narrative for finance versus ops. Tool: crm_search_deals. Parameters: company_id company_helios_biotech or dealname "Helios" (parameter name is dealname per Server_Tools_Details.md; value can match the deal name substring). Outcome: Deal id deal_helios_osman_cryo_apr2026, amount 14200, dealstage inprogress (human-readable: in progress), description referencing CryoShip Express cancellation, QuickBooks estimate NMX-2026-0501 pending final vendor award.
OE 7 — Purpose: Confirm deal details and engagement history including prior ops note. Tool: crm_get_deal. Parameters: id deal_helios_osman_cryo_apr2026. Outcome: Full deal text for Dr. Yara Osman cold chain, Emeka Diallo account manager, Fatimah coordinator, dealstage inprogress (human-readable: in progress), booked value alignment language.
OE 8 — Purpose: List existing CRM notes on the account for context before adding a finance-visible note. Tool: crm_list_engagements. Parameters: company_ids ["company_helios_biotech"]. Outcome: Engagement engagement_helios_cryoship_escalation_0424 (NOTE) describing CryoShip DOT failure, Fatimah escalation to Chloe, Greg Pallone at Swift suggested, client risk on clinical trial cultures.
OE 9 — Purpose: Reconcile relocation row and client account notes where narrative and numbers may diverge. Tool: airtable_list_bases then airtable_list_tables to resolve base MoveOps Relocations (base_moveops_ops) and table ids; then airtable_get_record or airtable_search_records for the relocation row, and a second read for the client account row (airtable_list_records has no field filter in Server_Tools_Details.md, so do not describe it as filtered to Helios). Parameters: (1) base_id base_moveops_ops, table_name tblRelocations01, field_name Company, value Helios Biotech (or airtable_get_record with record_id recHeliosOsmanCryoPhlSan2026). (2) Second read: airtable_get_record with table_name tblClientAccts01 and record_id recAcctHeliosBiotech2026 (or airtable_search_records on an appropriate field and value for that table). Outcome: Relocation record for Dr. Yara Osman, Philadelphia PA to San Diego CA, Move Start Date 2026-05-01, Move End Date 2026-05-03, CryoShip cancelled 2026-04-24, Swift Relocations and Greg Pallone under escalation, roughly two hundred thousand dollar culture exposure if move slips, QB estimate NMX-2026-0501 total fourteen thousand two hundred pending final award. Client account recAcctHeliosBiotech2026 Notes: estimate NMX-2026-0501 at fourteen thousand two hundred while replacement carrier is confirmed (tension with pending award language elsewhere).
OE 10 — Purpose: Locate the active engineering ticket for replacement carrier work. Tool: linear_list_issues. Parameters: query (e.g. "Helios" or "CryoShip" or "cold chain"), project proj_helios_biotech, team team_relocations (use this token, not the informal phrase "team relocations"). Outcome: Issue id issue_helios_cryoship_vendor_failure, number 520, title matching tool output (e.g. Cold chain move: Dr. Yara Osman (Helios Biotech) PHL to SAN, CryoShip vendor failure, replacement carrier), state_id state_in_progress (human-readable: in progress), due_date 2026-05-01, description includes Swift and Greg Pallone escalation and QuickBooks NMX-2026-0501 fourteen thousand two hundred.
OE 11 — Purpose: Confirm issue body for finance comment grounding. Tool: linear_get_issue. Parameters: id issue_helios_cryoship_vendor_failure. Outcome: Same identifiers and narrative as OE 10 for tying finance assumptions to ops-confirmed Swift and May timing in a comment.
OE 12 — Purpose: Resolve duplicate Swift vendor contact rows if both appear as Greg Pallone. Tool: contacts_search_contacts. Parameters: query "Greg Pallone". Outcome: At least two records (e.g. contact_vendor_swift National Account Manager Dallas vs contacts_contact_67751abdae72 Regional Account Director Columbus vendor-facing MoveOps); choose authoritative vendor record aligned with CRM escalation to Swift Relocations corporate relocation contact.
OE 13 — Purpose: Optional calendar check for finance pressure before April 30 as the prompt allows. Tool: calendar_get_calendar_events_from_to. Parameters: start_datetime and end_datetime covering late April 2026 around the April 30 confirmation deadline (not calendar_read_today_calendar_events, which only reflects “today” and does not sweep the deadline window). Outcome: No populated events in exported universe calendar data for this window (empty calendar), so no calendar-driven finance pressure found beyond email and Slack deadlines.
OE 14 — Purpose: Email Marcus with booked estimate, culture exposure, memo framing, and carrier uncertainty. Tool: send_email. Parameters: sender alejandro.fuentes@moveops.com, recipients ["marcus.thorne@moveops.com"], subject line referencing Helios cold chain or Elena vendor memo context, content in plain finance English: QuickBooks estimate NMX-2026-0501 fourteen thousand two hundred dollars booked; separate roughly two hundred thousand dollar trial culture exposure cited in ops and Airtable; clarify whether both belong in the same sentence for Elena’s memo; state uncertainty on final Swift Relocations award versus written client confirmation from Dr. Osman by April 30 and May 1 and May 3 dates.
OE 15 — Purpose: Add a short finance-visible CRM note tied to the Helios deal as the prompt asks; CRM has no deal-scoped engagement tool, so implement as a company-level NOTE on Helios Biotech with the deal called out in the body. Tool: crm_create_engagement. Parameters: engagement_type NOTE, company_ids ["company_helios_biotech"], title optional (e.g. Finance visibility Helios cold chain), body summarizing booked estimate NMX-2026-0501 fourteen thousand two hundred, culture exposure risk framing, pending replacement carrier confirmation, explicit reference to deal id deal_helios_osman_cryo_apr2026.
OE 16 — Purpose: Leave a Linear comment tying finance assumptions to ops-confirmed Swift and timing. Tool: linear_create_comment. Parameters: issueId issue_helios_cryoship_vendor_failure, body linking fourteen thousand two hundred estimate NMX-2026-0501 to ops confirmation status for Swift through Greg Pallone, May 1 pickup and May 3 delivery expectations, and what remains unconfirmed for client written commitments by April 30.
OE 17 — Purpose: Post a one-screen finance summary in Slack before Marcus’s next leadership touchpoint. Tool: conversations_add_message. Parameters: channel_id C005 (#finance), payload markdown summarizing Helios exposure, fourteen thousand two hundred booked vs roughly two hundred thousand culture risk, carrier and client commitment uncertainty, thread_ts null unless replying in an existing finance thread. Outcome: Finance channel post with risk stated honestly and uncertainty explicit.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
universe_idmcp-advanced-3-20-moveops-metadata
